changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO REPOSITORY ( USER_NAME, REPOSITORY_NAME, PRIVATE, DEFAULT_BRANCH, REGISTERED_DATE, UPDATED_DATE, LAST_ACTIVITY_DATE ) SELECT mr.USER_NAME, mr.REPOSITORY_NAME, TRUE, 'main', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP FROM ( SELECT ORIGIN_USER_NAME AS USER_NAME, ORIGIN_REPOSITORY_NAME AS REPOSITORY_NAME FROM REPOSITORY WHERE ORIGIN_USER_NAME IS NOT NULL AND ORIGIN_REPOSITORY_NAME IS NOT NULL UNION SELECT PARENT_USER_NAME AS USER_NAME, PARENT_REPOSITORY_NAME AS REPOSITORY_NAME FROM REPOSITORY WHERE PARENT_USER_NAME IS NOT NULL AND PARENT_REPOSITORY_NAME IS NOT NULL ) mr LEFT JOIN REPOSITORY er ON er.USER_NAME = mr.USER_NAME AND er.REPOSITORY_NAME = mr.REPOSITORY_NAME WHERE er.REPOSITORY_NAME IS NULL
